name: RedDoorz Syariah near Balai Meuseuraya Aceh

hotelImages.caption: Baiturrahman Grand Mosque - 3.24 km from property

contentSummary.displayName: RedDoorz Syariah near Balai Meuseuraya Aceh
contentSummary.defaultName: RedDoorz Syariah near Balai Meuseuraya Aceh
contentSummary.localeName: RedDoorz Syariah near Balai Meuseuraya Aceh

address.address1: Jl. T. Panglima Nyak Makam No.17

description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers free Wi-Fi in all rooms. Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options.

details.title: Infant 0-0 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

details.title: Children 1-12 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

adult: Guests 13 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

reviews.hotelName: RedDoorz Syariah near Balai Meuseuraya Aceh

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Balai Meuseuraya Aceh
comments.reviewComments:
Facilities and prices are okay. 
The downside is cleanliness. 
At least sweep the floor if there are guests, even in the cheap rooms. 
There are spider webs, trash under the bed, and the floor seems like it has never been swept.
comments.originalComment:
Fasilitas dan harga ok
Minus di kebersihan 
Minimal di sapu lah kalau ada tamu walaupun di kamar yang murah, 
Sarang laba2 ,sampah d bawah tempat tidur ,trus lantai kaya ga pernah di sapu

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Balai Meuseuraya Aceh
comments.reviewNegatives:
When I arrived it was clear that there was an overbooking and therefore no place for me (because of the PON games?) 

The people don't speak English but we were able to communicate via Google Translate. The people did their utmost to help me find an accommodation and even ordered a Grab. But the hotel (Tsacita RedDoorz) where I ended up was anything but what I had booked:
So this review is about the hotel RedDoorz send me to, not this hotel itself!! 

Extra taxi cost to go to other hotel. 
I have been traveling for a long time and often sleep in cheaper hotels but the price quality ratio of this hotel is about the worst I have ever come across. I paid 26€ for 1 night but the room was only worth half of that in my opinion. The rooms are completely dilapidated: broken floor tiles, peeling paint, completely worn sink, very uncomfortable beds and unsafe electricity supply. The sink leaks so that the entire bathroom is flooded when you wash your hands for example. 
No working hot water in the shower and no toiletries. 

Worst of all: when I was already in bed at 8:30 PM, the owner woman came into the room uninvited with her key and I had to get up to pay for my room. Never experienced this on all my trips. Let me pay immediately upon check-in, no problem, but not in this way. I find it outrageous that a member of staff suddenly stands in my room while I am sleeping, even though they apologize afterwards. 

By the way, I will never book with the RedDoorz chain again. I had booked 2 hotels with them in Banda Aceh, of which this overbooking and also my booking of a hotel for later on my trip was not ok. The booked hotel suddenly turned out to be no longer available, so I had to go to another one. Fortunately, I was able to cancel the latter for free. 
Don't spend €26 on this hotel, spend €10 more and then you will be able to book a much nicer and better located hotel. 
What I also never had to do for a hotel room is to give a deposit, but here I did.
comments.reviewPositives: Large room and air conditioning works well. Close (about 500 meters) to a small shopping center with restaurants and a supermarket.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Balai Meuseuraya Aceh
comments.reviewComments: The hotel basically overbooked, gave us another location, we went to 2 different locations which was provided by the host, only for the pinned location to be wrong. Rather than admitting they wrongly sent the location, they were argumentative too. Finally we just accepted the listing because we were exhausted. The room itself was dusty, had to climb 4 flights of stairs and the door had a bit of a gap even though it was closed. Wifi barely worked. Nit recommended.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Balai Meuseuraya Aceh
comments.reviewComments: The room does not match the picture at all. It's dirty and dusty.. the plywood door is a bit loose allowing mosquitoes and dragonflies to get in.. the water is yellow and my nails turned yellow.. I ended up taking a shower elsewhere because I was disgusted with the water. I booked a king size room, but I was given small separate mattresses instead.
comments.reviewTitle: Dirty. The plywood door of the room does not match the picture.
comments.originalTitle: Jorok. pintu triplek kamar gk sesuai gambar
comments.originalComment:
Tidak sesuai gambar kamarnya beda banget
Jorok bedebu.. m pintu triplek agak renggang masuk nyamuk sekalian capung2.. air kuning sampai kuku saya kuning.. saya sampai mandi di tempat lain karna jijik sama airnya.
Pesan kamar kasir King size.. malah dikasih kasur kecil2 pisah

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz Syariah near Balai Meuseuraya Aceh
comments.reviewComments:
Well served  
Comfortable place  
Clean place
comments.originalComment:
Di layani dengan baik 
Tempat nyaman
Tempat bersih
